calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-016 Dynamic Precision Commitment Test (hazard_harm=0.02, alpha_world=0.9)
items.description: FIXED 2026-03-18 (run 2): (1) alpha_world=0.9 (SD-008 — fixes z_world EMA suppression). (2) Commit formula fixed: committed = running_variance < 0.02 in variance-space (prior formula compared precision ~95 against threshold ~0.703 → always True). (3) Env redesigned for 10× contrast: stable=3 hazards/drift_prob=0/interval=100 vs perturbed=20 hazards/drift_prob=1.0/interval=1. Prior envs (10 vs 10 hazards, prob 0.1 vs 0.9) gave only var_diff=0.0006. PASS: var_diff>0.02 AND prec_diff>0 AND commit_diff>0.

items.title: MECH-100 Event-Auxiliary Contrastive Encoder Loss (hazard_harm=0.02, alpha=0.9)
items.description: FIXED: hazard_harm=0.02, alpha_world=0.9, warmup=1000. Tests SD-009/MECH-100: CE event classifier (Linear(world_dim,3)) backprops through z_world encoder. Labels: 0=none, 1=env_caused_hazard, 2=agent_caused_hazard. λ_event=0.5. PASS C1: calibration_gap>0.05, C2: event_classification_acc>0.5, C3: selectivity_margin>0.005.

items.title: Event-Auxiliary Contrastive Encoder Loss — Seed 1
items.description: Repeat of EXQ-020 with seed=1 for robustness.

items.title: Event-Auxiliary Contrastive Loss — Strong λ=2.0 (hazard_harm=0.02, alpha=0.9)
items.description: FIXED: hazard_harm=0.02, alpha_world=0.9, warmup=1000. EXQ-020 variant with λ_event=2.0 (4× stronger contrastive signal). If EXQ-020 achieves classification accuracy but not calibration_gap, tests whether stronger CE loss helps. Risk: forgetting of E1/E2 reconstruction.

items.title: Combined Event-Contrastive + lstsq Reafference (hazard_harm=0.02, alpha=0.9)
items.description: FIXED: hazard_harm=0.02, alpha_world=0.9, warmup=1000. Combines EXQ-020 (contrastive CE loss) and lstsq reafference correction. Tests whether combination produces calibration_gap>0.05 when neither alone does.

items.title: MECH-071 V3: E3.harm_eval Calibration Gap (alpha_world=0.9, no reafference)
items.description: V3 redesign of MECH-071: tests whether E3.harm_eval(z_world) distinguishes agent-caused hazard vs locomotion states. alpha_world=0.9 (SD-008 prerequisite). No reafference correction (baseline for EXQ-027). PASS: calibration_gap>0.05. Prerequisite for SD-003 attribution.

items.title: SD-003 V3: Full Reafference Pipeline (SD-007 + SD-008 + E3.harm_eval)
items.description: Full V3 SD-003 attribution pipeline: ReafferencePredictor trained on empty steps removes perspective-shift from z_world. E3.harm_eval(z_world_corrected) evaluated by event type. PASS: calibration_gap>0.15 (higher bar than EXQ-026 because reafference should clean up signal). Tests SD-007 implementation in LatentStack.encode().
